zh.lifeSummary: John Mayo於1565年出生在英國多瑟特沙福斯波利。他於1595年之前與Elizabeth在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1630年3月20日之前在英國諾薩普頓史爾索普 曼德維爾，埋葬在英國諾薩普頓史爾索普 曼德維爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: John Mayo于1565年出生在英国多瑟特沙福斯波利。他于1595年之前与Elizabeth在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1630年3月20日之前在英国諾薩普頓史爾索普 曼德維爾，埋葬在英国諾薩普頓史爾索普 曼德維爾。

nameMeanings.name: Mayo

variants.name: Mayhew
meanings: English (East Anglia): from the French and Middle English personal name Maheu (Old French Mahieu), a common Norman form of Matthew . Its common Middle English pet form was Maw, by syncope of the medial -he-; see under Maw 1. See also May and Mahy .

History: Thomas Mayhew (1593–1682) came to Medford, MA, from Tisbury, Wiltshire, England, c. 1632, and subsequently moved to Watertown, MA. In 1642 he established a settlement on Martha's Vineyard, with his son Thomas, who was the first English missionary to the Indians of New England.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: John Mayo was born in 1565, in Shaftesbury, Dorset, England. He married Elizabeth before 1595, in Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. He died before 20 March 1630, in Thorpe Mandeville, Northamptonshire, England, and was buried in Thorpe Mandeville, Northamptonshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: John Mayo est né en 1565, à Shaftesbury, Dorset, Angleterre. Il a épousé Elizabeth avant 1595, à Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé avant 20 mars 1630, à Thorpe Mandeville, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, et a été enterré à Thorpe Mandeville, Northamptonshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: John Mayo wurde 1565 in Shaftesbury, Dorset, England geboren. Er hat vor 1595 in Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom Elizabeth geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Er starb vor 20. März 1630 in Thorpe Mandeville, Northamptonshire, England und wurde in Thorpe Mandeville, Northamptonshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: John Mayo è nato il nel 1565 nel Shaftesbury, Dorset, England. Lui sposato Elizabeth prima del 1595, nel Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Morì prima del 20 marzo 1630, nel Thorpe Mandeville, Northamptonshire, England, e fu sepolto a Thorpe Mandeville, Northamptonshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: John Mayoは1565年にイギリスドールセトシャフテスブリーで生まれた。1595年以前にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアでElizabethと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1630年3月20日以前にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアソルペ マンデヴィルで死去し，イギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアソルペ マンデヴィルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Mayo(은)는 1565년 영국 도르세트 샤프츠버이에서 태어났다. 그는 1595년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르에서 Elizabeth(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1630년 3월 20일 이전 영국 노르섬프토실르 소 먼데빌에서 사망했으며 영국 노르섬프토실르 소 먼데빌에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: John Mayo nasceu em 1565, em Shaftesbury, Dorset, Inglaterra. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth antes 1595, em Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu antes 20 de março de 1630, em Thorpe Mandeville, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, e foi sepultado em Thorpe Mandeville, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: John Mayo родился в 1565 г. в местности шафтесбури, дорсет, Англия. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth перед 1595 г. в местности нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Он умер перед 20 марта 1630 г. в местности таурп мандевилл, нортамптоншир, Англия и был похоронен в местности таурп мандевилл, нортамптоншир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: John Mayo nació en 1565, en Shaftesbury, Dorset, Inglaterra. Se casó con Elizabeth antes de 1595, en Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas. Murió antes de 20 de marzo de 1630, en Thorpe Mandeville, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, y fue sepultado en Thorpe Mandeville, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra.
